title: MAC housing project
body: " MAC housing project is now live  For more details on how to apply, go to: Migration Advisory Committee housing project - Contracts Finder  Bids will close at 11am on 13 May 2025 and projects will be awarded at the end of June 2025.   In the next few weeks, the MAC will seek to procure researchers/research teams to undertake research projects to fill crucial evidence gaps in the MAC’s understanding of the impact of migration on housing in the UK.  There are two funding pots for projects. The first is for a literature review, with a ceiling of £15,000, with which we intend to award one project. The second is for a more open project(s) exploring the impact of migration on house prices in the UK, with a ceiling of £60,000, with which we intend to award up to 2 projects. Bidders may bid for projects in one or both pots.  Please see attached statement of requirements document for more details.  Ahead of the competition going live, you can sign up for the government e-sourcing portal. Once the competition is launched, we will update the website accordingly and provide the links to apply. "
